concerns.text: FR-002 uses vague terms 'null percentage negligible' and 'format validation pass rate is sufficiently high' without quantitative thresholds. SC-013 specifies null <1% and format ≥95% - FR-002 should match these explicit values for testability.

SC-005 states 'The vast majority of knots with computable invariants have all invariants populated' - 'vast majority' is not quantified. Per maintainer decision, this should be '≥ 95% of knots with computable invariants have all invariants populated'.
